title: Trump says he called off new Iran attack at request of Gulf states
description: The US president says he is holding off on a US attack planned for Tuesday as "serious negotiations are now taking place".
content:
US President Donald Trump has said he is holding off a military attack on Iran planned for Tuesday at the request of Gulf states as "serious negotiations are now taking place".

title: Images released after man stabbed on Stafford golf course
description: The man is seen running in the middle of a road in the Castlefields area close to the golf course.
content:
Police have released images of a man they would like to speak to after another man was stabbed while walking through a golf course.
Emergency services were called to the scene off Newport Road in Stafford, at about 19:00 BST on Thursday.

title: RHS Chelsea Flower Show: Charles and Camilla view gardens as gnome ban lifted
description: Sir David Beckham co-designed a garden with the King and Alan Titchmarsh for this year's show, which also welcomes back garden gnomes.
content:
It must be a strange job being King. One minute you're facing up to US President Donald Trump in the US Congress. The next you're being introduced to garden gnomes.
King Charles and Queen Camilla were at this year's Chelsea Flower Show, a strange and... [2352 chars]

title: Andy Burnham vows to ‘change Labour’ in direct challenge to Keir Starmer
description: Expected candidate in Makerfield byelection says party ‘needs to change if we are to regain people’s trust’
content:
Andy Burnham drew the battle lines for the future of the Labour party on Monday as the Greater Manchester mayor promised he would “change Labour” and win back the voters the party had lost.

title: Greens split over how hard to challenge Burnham in Makerfield byelection
description: Some in party fear all-out campaign could boost Reform’s chances but others say it is not Greens’ job to help Labour
content:
The Greens are locked in an internal debate about how hard to challenge Andy Burnham in the Makerfield byelection, with some members worried about allowing Reform UK to win and others wanting their party to go all-out.
